name: Sinful Spoils of Slumber - Morrian
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>微睡</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>まどろみ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>罪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ざい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>宝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－モーリアン
desc: Target 1 face-up Special Summoned monster on the field; change it to face-down Defense Position. If you control a Level 5 or higher Illusion monster, while this card is in your GY: You can Set this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use 1 "Sinful Spoils of Slumber - Morrian" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: Target 1 face-up Special Summoned monster on the field; change it to face-down Defense Position. If you control a Level 5 or higher Illusion monster, while this card is in your GY: You can Set this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use 1 "Sinful Spoils of Slumber - Morrian" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
